## 🚀 Features

- **AWS org scanning**: Discovers all accounts in an AWS Organization and scans them in parallel via cross-account AssumeRole — per-account failures are non-fatal
- **Azure multi-subscription**: Auto-discovers and scans all subscriptions in the tenant concurrently
- **GCP org scanning**: Discovers all projects in an org hierarchy via recursive folder traversal
- **Checkpoint / Resume**: Interrupted multi-account scans resume from where they left off — completed units are not re-scanned
- **DNS record type breakdown**: Per-type rows (`A`, `AAAA`, `CNAME`, `MX`, `TXT`, `SRV`, …) instead of a single aggregate — applies to Route53, Azure DNS, and GCP Cloud DNS
- **New AWS resource types**: Internet Gateway, NAT Gateway, Transit Gateway, VPN Gateway, Customer Gateway (Managed Assets); Elastic IP (Active IPs); IPAM Pool, VPC CIDR Block, Route53 Resolver Endpoint (DDI Objects)
- **New Azure resource types**: Application Gateway, NAT Gateway, Azure Firewall, VNet Gateway, Virtual Hub (Managed Assets); LB Frontend IP, VNet Gateway IP (Active IPs); Public IP (DDI Objects)
- **New GCP resource types**: Forwarding Rule / load balancer frontend (Managed Assets); Internal Range, GKE Cluster CIDR, Secondary Subnet Range (DDI Objects)

## 🔧 Enhancements

- **Retry with backoff**: Rate limiting (429) and transient errors (5xx) trigger automatic retry instead of scan failure — visible in the scan progress stream
- **Configurable concurrency**: Advanced Options lets you set parallel accounts/subscriptions/projects per provider (default: 5)
